tab-ai-instant-context-a1.task:
Eliminate the ~3.4s delay when pressing Tab to open inline AI chat in the main menu. The delay is caused by build_tab_ai_context_cards() in src/app_impl/tab_ai_mode.rs (around line 235) calling capture_context_snapshot() with include_focused_window: true, which triggers capture_focused_window_screenshot() in src/platform/ai_commands.rs — this enumerates all windows via xcap, captures a screenshot, resizes with Lanczos3, and encodes PNG, all synchronously on the main thread. The context cards only need the window TITLE, not a screenshot.

FIX: Extend the existing frontmost_app_tracker (src/frontmost_app_tracker/mod.rs) to also cache the focused window title. The tracker already watches NSWorkspaceDidActivateApplicationNotification and stores TrackedApp {pid, bundle_id, name} in a global RwLock<TrackerState>. Add a window_title: Option<String> field to TrackedApp. On each app activation notification, also grab the frontmost window title via a lightweight method — either CGWindowListCopyWindowInfo (fast, ~1ms) filtering by the activated app's PID, or AXUIElementCopyAttributeValue for kAXFocusedWindowAttribute then kAXTitleAttribute. Do NOT use xcap or capture screenshots.

Then update build_tab_ai_context_cards() in src/app_impl/tab_ai_mode.rs to use get_last_real_app() from the tracker instead of calling capture_context_snapshot() with include_focused_window: true. Replace the expensive snapshot call with the instant tracker lookup. The frontmost app card should use app.name and the focused window card should use app.window_title (if Some and non-empty).

Also update the two other call sites that use capture_context_snapshot with include_focused_window: true — check capture_focused_window_live() in src/context_snapshot/capture.rs to see if it can also benefit from using the cached title instead of the expensive xcap path (at minimum for the title-only use case).

KEY FILES: src/frontmost_app_tracker/mod.rs (TrackedApp struct, TrackerState, the NSWorkspace observer callback around line 398, start_tracking(), get_last_real_app()), src/app_impl/tab_ai_mode.rs (build_tab_ai_context_cards around line 221, open_tab_ai_chat around line 135), src/context_snapshot/capture.rs (capture_focused_window_live around line 182, capture_context_snapshot around line 206), src/platform/ai_commands.rs (capture_focused_window_screenshot — do NOT modify this, it may still be needed for actual screenshot use cases).

CONSTRAINTS from CLAUDE.md: Use parking_lot::Mutex/RwLock (non-poisoning). Every unsafe block needs a // SAFETY: comment. ObjC runtime is objc = 0.2 (NOT objc2). Use msg_send! with explicit return types. Nil-check ObjC pointers. Every #[cfg(target_os = macos)] function needs a #[cfg(not(target_os = macos))] stub. Use tracing::{info,warn,debug} for logging. No unwrap/expect in production code. Use ? + anyhow::Context or explicit handling.

VERIFICATION: cargo check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test
tab-ai-instant-context-a1.notes: [auto] timed out after 1800s — task too broad
